recommendations.title: Catch up on your tax reserve
recommendations.body: Your reserve is $1,500 of an estimated $1,950 target. You've started — staying on plan keeps you ahead of next quarter.
recommendations.next_move: Add $450 before your next quarterly (due in 27 days).

recommendations.title: Build buffer during your stronger months
recommendations.body: Your income runs irregularly with about 40% month-to-month variation. The months you have surplus are how you build buffer for the lean ones.
recommendations.next_move: When income comes in above your typical, redirect the difference to liquid savings before it gets reabsorbed.

recommendations.reason: Your personalised plan: Months 1–6: Build emergency fund — $975/month
You currently have 2.9 months of essential expenses saved. Three months is the minimum buffer to absorb income shocks.
Life coverage is one of five resilience milestones; term policies are inexpensive at younger ages.

recommendations.action: Add disability insurance to your benefits
recommendations.reason: Disability is a top cause of unplanned income loss; check whether your employer offers it.
